content_blocks.text:
उदगयने रविशीतमयूखौ वक्रसमागमगाः परिशेषाः ।
विपुलकरा युधि चोत्तरसंस्थाश्चेष्टितवीर्ययुताः परिकल्प्याः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
उदगयने रविशीतमयूखौ वक्रसमागमगाः परिशेषाः ।
विपुलकरा युधि चोत्तरसंस्थाश्चेष्टितवीर्ययुताः परिकल्प्याः ॥

content_blocks.text:
The words समागमेोपग in the text have been used in a purely
technical way, the meaning being "when in conjunction with the
Moon" of. "समागमगाः चन्द्रेण सहिताः बलिन एव, चन्द्रेण संयोगो ग्रहार्णा समागम-
शब्दो वाच्यः” (उत्पलः)

verse_data.translation:
The words समागमेोपग in the text have been used in a purely
technical way, the meaning being "when in conjunction with the
Moon" of. "समागमगाः चन्द्रेण सहिताः बलिन एव, चन्द्रेण संयोगो ग्रहार्णा समागम-
शब्दो वाच्यः” (उत्पलः)

content_blocks.text: वक्रो रणे चोत्तरगो विधत्ते चेष्टावलं चित्रसमागमेऽपि ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text: वक्रो रणे चोत्तरगो विधत्ते चेष्टावलं चित्रसमागमेऽपि ॥

content_blocks.text:
For details regarding the effects of the several kinds of
balas, please refer to Saravali (सारावली) ch. V. Slokas-28-46.

verse_data.translation:
For details regarding the effects of the several kinds of
balas, please refer to Saravali (सारावली) ch. V. Slokas-28-46.

content_blocks.text:
क्रमेण दृक्स्थाननिसर्गचेष्टादिक्कालवीर्याणि च षड्वलानि ।
सुधाकरेष्विन्दुश्शरेन्दु शैल भेदानि तानि प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥ ३८ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
क्रमेण दृक्स्थाननिसर्गचेष्टादिक्कालवीर्याणि च षड्वलानि ।
सुधाकरेष्विन्दुश्शरेन्दु शैल भेदानि तानि प्रवदन्ति सन्तः ॥ ३८ ॥

content_blocks.text:
Sloka. 38. Professors of Astrology say that the
six kinds of strength (षड्वल-Shadbala) taken in the follow-
ing order namely रम्बल-Drigbala (strength of aspect),
स्थानबल-Stthanabala (positional strength), निसर्गवल-Nisaraga-
bala (natural strength), चेष्ठाबल-Cheshtabala (motional
strength), दिग्वल-Digbala (directional strength), कालवल-
Kalabala (temporal strength) have varieties indicated by
the numbers 1, 5, 1, 5, 1, 7.

verse_data.translation:
Sloka. 38. Professors of Astrology say that the
six kinds of strength (षड्वल-Shadbala) taken in the follow-
ing order namely रम्बल-Drigbala (strength of aspect),
स्थानबल-Stthanabala (positional strength), निसर्गवल-Nisaraga-
bala (natural strength), चेष्ठाबल-Cheshtabala (motional
strength), दिग्वल-Digbala (directional strength), कालवल-
Kalabala (temporal strength) have varieties indicated by
the numbers 1, 5, 1, 5, 1, 7.

content_blocks.text:
Here the author wants to mention the number of sub-divi-
sions of the several kinds of balas, vis.,
(1) Drigbala (इग्बल) is by itself one;
(2) Stthanabala (स्पानबल) consists of 5 sub-divisions, viz; (i)
Uchchabala (उच्चवल) (ii) Sapthavargajabala (सप्तवर्ग जबल) (iii) Yugma-
yugmabala (युग्मायुग्मक) (iv) Kendradibula (केन्द्रशीक्षक) and (v) Drek-
kanabala (द्वेष्फणवल)
(3) Nisargabala (निसर्गवल) is by itself one and has no sub-division.
(4) Cheshtabala (चेष्टावल) is said to consist of 5 sub-divisions ;
what these are, it is not exactly known. [i Vakra (वक), ii Samagama

विपुलकरा युधि चोत्तरसंस्थाश्चेष्टितवीर्ययुताः परिकल्प्याः ॥
The words समागमेोपग in the text have been used in a purely
technical way, the meaning being "when in conjunction with the
Moon" of. "समागमगाः चन्द्रेण सहिताः बलिन एव, चन्द्रेण संयोगो ग्रहार्णा समागम-
शब्दो वाच्यः” (उत्पलः)
cf. श्रीपतिपद्धति Adhyaya-III-15 & 16.

For details regarding the effects of the several kinds of
balas, please refer to Saravali (सारावली) ch. V. Slokas-28-46.

Sloka. 38. Professors of Astrology say that the
six kinds of strength (षड्वल-Shadbala) taken in the follow-
ing order namely रम्बल-Drigbala (strength of aspect),
स्थानबल-Stthanabala (positional strength), निसर्गवल-Nisaraga-
bala (natural strength), चेष्ठाबल-Cheshtabala (motional
strength), दिग्वल-Digbala (directional strength), कालवल-
Kalabala (temporal strength) have varieties indicated by
the numbers 1, 5, 1, 5, 1, 7.
NOTES.
Here the author wants to mention the number of sub-divi-
sions of the several kinds of balas, vis.,
(1) Drigbala (इग्बल) is by itself one;
(2) Stthanabala (स्पानबल) consists of 5 sub-divisions, viz; (i)
Uchchabala (उच्चवल) (ii) Sapthavargajabala (सप्तवर्ग जबल) (iii) Yugma-
yugmabala (युग्मायुग्मक) (iv) Kendradibula (केन्द्रशीक्षक) and (v) Drek-
kanabala (द्वेष्फणवल)
(3) Nisargabala (निसर्गवल) is by itself one and has no sub-division.
(4) Cheshtabala (चेष्टावल) is said to consist of 5 sub-divisions ;
what these are, it is not exactly known. [i Vakra (वक), ii Samagama
